title: lastrea semicordata
intro: Lastrea semicordata, also known as the Semicord Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The Semicord Fern has been found to have several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin infections.
